title: Cyclobalanopsis tiaoloshanica
taxonomy: Cyclobalanopsis tiaoloshanica is a species of flowering plant in the family Fagaceae. It belongs to the genus Cyclobalanopsis, which is a group of deciduous trees and shrubs native to Asia. The genus Cyclobalanopsis is often considered to be part of the beech family and is closely related to the beeches. Cyclobalanopsis tiaoloshanica is endemic to China and is considered to be an endangered species. As a member of the Fagaceae family, Cyclobalanopsis tiaoloshanica is also related to other species such as oak and beech.

The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis tiaoloshanica include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory disorders, such as asthma and bronchitis.
